profile: 高宜人性 · 亲和协调者
tension: 你的 Gallup 主导领域（关系建立）与 Holland 三码中的 S 型高度一致，说明你在相关方向上拥有内外双重能量支撑。 / Your leading Gallup domain (关系建立) aligns strongly with the S type in your Holland code, giving you both internal motivation and natural ability in related directions.
data_quality_notes: Gallup 模拟量表 A/B 双侧映射已完整（双侧计分题 98.3%，34/34 个主题参与计分）。结果为探索性参考，非官方 CliftonStrengths 报告。/ Gallup simulation has full A/B mapping (dual-side 98.3%, 34/34 themes scored). Results are for exploration—not an official CliftonStrengths report.
